content_markdown:
# "Armed for Battle"
## Scripture
"Put on the whole armor of God, that you may be able to stand against the schemes of the devil." – Ephesians 6:11
## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we are called to put on the armor of God to face the challenges of the day. This armor is not just a physical suit, but a spiritual one that protects us from the enemy's schemes and attacks. It consists of the belt of truth, the breastplate of righteousness, the gospel of peace, the shield of faith, the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit. Each piece of this armor is essential for our protection and effectiveness in battle.

As we put on this armor, we are reminded that we are not fighting against flesh and blood, but against principalities and powers in the spiritual realm. We need to be sober-minded, putting on the whole armor of God, and praying at all times in the Spirit. By doing so, we will be able to stand against the enemy's schemes and stand firm in the faith.

## Daily Challenge
"Do 50 sit-ups while praying for the Lord to give you strength and resilience in spiritual battle."
